arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ElastiCache Subnet Group.

description.description: A brief description of the ElastiCache Subnet Group.

id.description: The unique identifier for the ElastiCache Subnet Group.

subnet_ids.description: A list of subnet IDs associated with the ElastiCache Subnet Group.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC where the ElastiCache Subnet Group resides.
